channel.title: BTC War Market Guides
channel.description: Guides to live Bitcoin price, market depth, order flow, and the BTC War visualization.

item.title: Medieval Siege vs Champion Duel: Two Views of Crypto Market Pressure
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: A comparison of army-scale siege warfare and continuous one-on-one combat as two visual forms of live BUY and SELL pressure.

item.title: Voxel Siege and Arcane War: Visualizing Live Buy and Sell Pressure
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: Two fantasy-style WebGL scenes that map live aggregate trades and visible depth into block-world and arcane combat.

item.title: From Bitcoin Battlefield to Space War: Visualizing Crypto Order Flow at Scale
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: How one live market model becomes a stable ground front and a bounded three-dimensional fleet war.

item.title: How Live Crypto Order Flow Drives Six 3D Battlefields
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: A visual tour of six WebGL battlefields driven by live crypto price, aggregate trades, market depth, and BUY/SELL pressure.

item.title: BTC Price Today: What 24-Hour Change, Volume, and Market Depth Mean
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: A practical guide to rolling 24-hour BTC statistics, spread, depth, liquidity, and executed order flow.

item.title: Bitcoin Price, Market Depth, and Order Flow: A Practical Glossary
item.dc:creator: blibli
item.description: Definitions and relationships for Bitcoin price, spread, order-book liquidity, market depth, executed order flow, and buy/sell pressure.
